articles.title: Botnet of more than 17 million devices dismantled
articles.content: The botnet was reportedly tied to a Russia-based residential proxy network.
articles.titleZh: 拆除了超过1700万台设备的僵尸网络
articles.contentZh: 据报道，该僵尸网络与一家位于俄罗斯的住宅代理网络连接。

articles.title: Fed up with vibe coders, dev sneaks data-nuking prompt injection into their code
articles.content: Undisclosed addition in jqwik instructed AI coding agents to delete app output.
articles.titleZh: 受够了vibe编码器，开发人员将数据核对提示注入到他们的代码中
articles.contentZh: Jqwik中未公开的添加指示AI编码代理删除应用输出。

articles.title: Websites have a new way to spy on visitors: Analyzing their SSD activity
articles.content: Telltale SSD activity can be measured in the browser using simple JavaScript.
articles.titleZh: 网站有一种监视访问者的新方法：分析其SSD活动
articles.contentZh: 可以使用简单的JavaScript在浏览器中测量Telltale SSD活动。

articles.title: Millions of AI agents imperiled by critical vulnerability in open source package
articles.content: "BadHost" was found in Starlette, a package with 325 million weekly downloads.
articles.titleZh: 数以百万计的人工智能代理受到开源软件包中严重漏洞的威胁
articles.contentZh: 在Starlette中找到了“BadHost” ，这是一个每周下载3.25亿次的软件包。

articles.title: Meta’s own AI was exploited to hijack Instagram accounts
articles.content: Meta's AI support chatbot helped hackers hijack Instagram accounts, as reported earlier by 404 Media. In a video shared on Telegram, a hacker shows how they could take over an account by asking Meta's chatbot to switch the email associated with someone else's profile and then reset the password. The issue, which Meta says has […]
articles.titleZh: Meta自己的人工智能被用来劫持Instagram账号
articles.contentZh: 正如404 Media早些时候报道的那样， Meta的人工智能支持聊天机器人帮助黑客劫持了Instagram帐户。在Telegram上分享的视频中，一名黑客展示了他们如何通过要求Meta的聊天机器人切换与其他人的个人资料相关联的电子邮件，然后重置密码来接管帐户。这个问题， Meta说有[…]

articles.title: Casey Neistat’s guide to posting every day
articles.content: Some news: The Vergecast is now a daily podcast! Starting today, we'll be posting every weekday, with even more gadgets and rankings and conversations and feelings and podcasts-within-podcasts. We're excited for all the ways this new schedule lets us tell new kinds of stories, experiment with new tech and new formats, and involve you even […]
articles.contentZh: 一些新闻： Vergecast现已成为每日播客！从今天开始，我们将在每个工作日发布更多小工具、排名、对话、感受和播客。我们很高兴看到这个新时间表让我们能够讲述新类型的故事，尝试新技术和新格式，甚至让您[…]参与进来。
